allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; lines=[l.strip\(\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]; last=json.loads\(lines[-1]\) if lines else {}; role=last.get\(''''message'''',{}\).get\(''''role'''',''''?''''\); stype=last.get\(''''type'''',''''?''''\); print\(''''role:'''',role,''''type:'''',stype\)")
